name: CustomDrop-HiroTeam
author: HiroshimaTeam
description: [ENG] This is a PocketMine-MP (or forks) plugin CustomDrop allows you to choose the drop of each block ! :grin:
readme_markdown:
# CustomDrop-HiroTeam ![CustomDrop](https://zupimages.net/up/20/24/4988.png) --- ### About [ENG] This is a [PocketMine-MP](https://github.com/pmmp/PocketMine-MP) (or forks) plugin CustomDrop allows you to choose the drop of each block ! :grin:

[FRA] C'est un [PocketMine-MP](https://github.com/pmmp/PocketMine-MP) plugin CustomDrop permet de choisir le drop de chaque blocs! :grin: --- ### How to use [ENG] Configure in config.yml for each block. you will not regret it
[FRA] Configurer dans le config.yml pour chaque blocs. Tu ne vas pas le regretter
--- ### **This plugin was tested (and works) on:** - [x] **[PocketMine-MP](https://github.com/pmmp/PocketMine-MP)** --- ### **LordHosting Partner** - [ENG] Our team is in partnership with Lordhosting, Minecraft PE server Hosting, VPS hosting use reduction code __**HIROTEAM**__ 10% FREE
-> Website : https://clients.lordhosting.fr
-> Discord : https://discord.gg/rRss47k
- [FRA] Notre équipe est en partenariat avec Lordhosting, hébergement de serveurs Minecraft PE, VPS utilise le code de réduction __**HIROTEAM**__ 10% DE REDUCTION
-> Site Web: https://clients.lordhosting.fr
